_comment: External data sources used by the calibration pipeline. The code auto-downloads files listed here on first use and caches them in data/calibration/raw/.

openflights_routes.notes: CSV with no header: airline, airline_id, src_airport, src_id, dst_airport, dst_id, codeshare, stops, equipment

openflights_airlines.description: OpenFlights airline IATA/ICAO code mappings (~6,000 airlines)
openflights_airlines.notes: CSV with no header: id, name, alias, iata, icao, callsign, country, active

ourairports_airports.notes: CSV with header. Includes IATA/ICAO codes, coordinates, elevation, type, country

ourairports_runways.notes: CSV with header. Includes length, width, surface, lighting, heading

bts_ontime_performance.description: BTS On-Time Performance monthly ZIP archives (US domestic)
bts_ontime_performance.notes: Monthly ZIPs named otp_YYYY_M.zip. Fields: reporting carrier, origin, dest, dep_delay, arr_delay, cancelled, diverted, carrier_delay, weather_delay, etc.

opensky_api.description: OpenSky Network live flight tracking API (for international airports not in BTS)
opensky_api.notes: REST API, queried on demand. Rate-limited. Optional auth for higher limits.
